# v0.2.1 Release Stabilization

Tag: `v0.2.1`
Target: `main`
Milestone: `v0.2.1 Release Stabilization`

## Highlights

- Adds `pnpm run ops:env:vercel` for secret-safe Vercel production env auditing.
- Hardens production milestone smoke checks so they follow the provider configuration that is actually deployed.
- Keeps MiroFish, TTS, image, video, and web-search readiness feature-scoped unless the release explicitly requires them.
- Preserves all public classroom, student, publish, generation, and game-session API contracts from `v0.2.0`.

## Production Readiness

Run:

```bash
VERCEL_PROJECT_ID=<project-id> VERCEL_TEAM_ID=<team-id> VERCEL_TOKEN=<token> corepack pnpm run ops:env:vercel
```

The audit reports only present/missing key names. If the Vercel API is unavailable, use the command's manual fallback checklist and record only presence status.

Optional feature smoke flags:

- `RAIC_REQUIRED_PRODUCTION_FEATURES=mirofish,tts,image,video,websearch`
- or individual `RAIC_REQUIRE_<FEATURE>_SMOKE=true`

## Verification Checklist

- [ ] `corepack pnpm test tests/server/vercel-env-audit.test.ts tests/server/production-smoke-readiness.test.ts`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run smoke:production:milestone`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run smoke:production:classroom`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run secrets:scan`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run ops:drift`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run check`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm lint`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run build`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run test:mirofish:gate`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run test:mirofish:e2e`
- [ ] `CI=1 corepack pnpm run test:e2e`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run benchmark:milestone`
- [ ] `corepack pnpm run ops:verify`

## Known Deferred Work

- Adaptive Classroom Intelligence remains queued for the next feature milestone.
- Provider Composer remains queued after release smoke and env audit behavior stay stable.
- Discord scheduled-class sync remains deferred unless it becomes part of the public release surface.
